sourceNote: Structured from content/reference-defra-outcomes-framework.md. Confirm against Defra’s official source before formal publishing.

vision.headline: Restoring nature, supporting growth, enhancing security
vision.description: As the steward of our natural resources, we strengthen the foundations of our economy and our national security.

sosSection.title: Secretary of State priorities and outcomes
sosSection.intro: To achieve the Secretary of State’s priorities over this parliament we will deliver these outcomes:

outcomes.text: Housing and infrastructure that is environmentally positive

owner.name: Toby Nation
owner.role: Director Environmental Quality, Infrastructure and Planning

owner.name: Deb Hankins
owner.role: Director Biodiversity, Land Use and Investment

outcomes.text: Nature accessible and enjoyable for all

secretaryOfStatePriorities.title: Reforming our water system so it drives growth, protects consumers and enhances the environment

outcomes.text: Resilient, reliable and safe supply of water to homes and businesses

secretaryOfStatePriorities.title: Backing British farming and food industry to boost production

outcomes.text: Profitable and resilient food sector that provides affordable, nutritious food

secretaryOfStatePriorities.title: Resetting trading relationships, including with the EU

outcomes.text: Trade barriers with the EU reduced for food, plants and animals

owner.name: Mark Thompson
owner.role: Director Trade Delivery and EU Reset Government Legislation

outcomes.text: Increased trade that supports domestic production, high food standards and downward pressure on food prices

resilienceSection.title: Resilience and Security outcomes
resilienceSection.intro: Defra is responsible for strengthening national security and resilience, the stewardship of critical national infrastructure and helping protect and restore critical global ecosystems.

outcomes.text: Protection from pollution and environmental hazards

owner.name: Toby Nation
owner.role: Director Environmental Quality, Infrastructure and Planning

outcomes.text: Minimise waste, tackle waste crime, maximise use of resources
Emergency preparedness and response to environmental incidents, disease outbreaks, food and water supply shocks

owner.name: Anjali Juneja
owner.role: Director Animal and Plant Health and Welfare

owner.name: Anjali Juneja
owner.role: Director Animal and Plant Health and Welfare

eipNoteText: This outcome contains targets that are part of the Environmental Improvement Plan.
